name: Expansion Hardline
description: Adds item rarity tiers and a player reputation system.
overview:
Expansion Hardline adds item rarity and a player reputation system to DayZ. The goal is to provide endgame content and progression by using reputation points to restrict certain Expansion mod systems and features, so players must unlock them over time.

If combined with Expansion AI, the mod also supports faction persistence — players can gain reputation points for each individual AI faction they interact with.

## Key Features

- **Item Rarity System** — Assign rarity tiers (Poor, Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Mythic, Exotic) to items, displayed in tooltips and market UI
- **Reputation System** — Players earn reputation through actions like killing AI, completing objectives, etc.
- **Feature Gating** — Require minimum reputation to access certain trader items, categories, or features
- **Faction Persistence** — Players can join AI factions and maintain membership across restarts
- **HUD Indicator** — Optional reputation points display in the main HUD
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionHardline to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate the HardlineSettings.json in your mission settings folder.
Configure item rarity requirements and reputation settings as desired.
Restart the server after adjusting settings.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure ShowHardlineHUD is set to 1. The player must be in-game for the HUD to appear.

troubleshooting.problem: Players can buy all items regardless of rarity
troubleshooting.solution: Verify UseReputation is set to 1 and item rarity requirements are set to values above 0.
Both UseFactionReputation and EnableFactionPersistence must be set to 1, and Expansion AI must be installed.

useCases.title: Progressive Economy
useCases.description: Gate high-tier market items behind reputation requirements. Players must earn reputation through gameplay before accessing the best gear.

useCases.title: Faction-Based Servers
useCases.description: Enable faction reputation and persistence to create faction-based gameplay where players build standing with different AI factions over time.

useCases.title: Visual Item Tiers
useCases.description: Use item rarity without reputation gating — just enable EnableItemRarity to add visual rarity indicators to items in the UI.

quickSettings.name: ShowHardlineHUD
quickSettings.description: Show or hide the reputation points indicator in the main HUD.

quickSettings.name: UseReputation
quickSettings.description: Enable the reputation system. Players gain reputation points for certain actions like eliminating entities.

quickSettings.name: UseFactionReputation
quickSettings.description: Enable per-faction reputation tracking. Requires Expansion AI for eAIFaction support.

quickSettings.name: EnableFactionPersistence
quickSettings.description: Allow faction membership to persist across server restarts.

quickSettings.name: EnableItemRarity
quickSettings.description: Enable the item rarity display system. Shows rarity in tooltips, icons, and menus.

quickSettings.name: PoorItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Poor' rarity.

quickSettings.name: CommonItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Common' rarity.

quickSettings.name: UncommonItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Uncommon' rarity.

quickSettings.name: RareItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Rare' rarity.

quickSettings.name: EpicItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Epic' rarity.

quickSettings.name: LegendaryItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Legendary' rarity.

quickSettings.name: MythicItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Mythic' rarity.

quickSettings.name: ExoticItemRequirement
quickSettings.description: Minimum reputation required to buy/sell items with 'Exotic' rarity.

useCases.description: Gate high-tier market items behind reputation requirements. Players must earn reputation through gameplay before accessing the best gear.

useCases.title: Faction-Based Servers
useCases.description: Enable faction reputation and persistence to create faction-based gameplay where players build standing with different AI factions over time.

useCases.title: Visual Item Tiers
useCases.description: Use item rarity without reputation gating — just enable EnableItemRarity to add visual rarity indicators to items in the UI.

If combined with Expansion AI, the mod also supports faction persistence — players can gain reputation points for each individual AI faction they interact with.

## Key Features

useCases.title: Reputation HUD not showing
useCases.description: Ensure ShowHardlineHUD is set to 1. The player must be in-game for the HUD to appear.

useCases.title: Players can buy all items regardless of rarity
useCases.description: Verify UseReputation is set to 1 and item rarity requirements are set to values above 0.

useCases.title: Faction persistence not working
useCases.description: Both UseFactionReputation and EnableFactionPersistence must be set to 1, and Expansion AI must be installed.
